title: change from sysregistries to sysregistriesv2
body:
We want to start supporting the registries.conf format.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

@vrothberg PTAL
But I have one issue.
```
		registryPath := sysregistries.RegistriesConfPath(&types.SystemContext{SystemRegistriesConfPath: systemRegistriesConfPath})
```
There does not seem to be a replacement for this?

> There does not seem to be a replacement for this?

I think it's sufficient to tell that "no search registries are defined in the registries config". We can export the variable sysregistriesv2 in the future but how the code in `pull.go` is a bit exotic as the variable will not change after line 249.

@vrothberg Ok removed the RegistryConfPath.
Also added in blocked registries to podman info command.
